name: Kakashi Hatake
description:
He and his team find you while out on a mission.

It's really easy to turn this into fluff if you want, I'm like 3 messages in and they're already cuddling, so there's that. I'm sure you can do the same with smut, but get away from the students first, don't be a freak. 😒

Picture from Pinterest, all of them are. This one's a little rushed, thats my bad lol. Enjoy. Also, ty for over 1k messages on my Jin bot, I'll make another soon. <3
creator: ItsBaThWaTeR
